mapper.select: SELECT id, source, started_at, finished_at, total_fetched, total_indexed, status, error_message, note FROM collection_log ORDER BY started_at DESC LIMIT #{limit}
SELECT id, source, started_at, finished_at, total_fetched, total_indexed, status, error_message, note FROM collection_log WHERE source = #{sourceName} ORDER BY started_at DESC LIMIT 1
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO collection_log (source, total_fetched, total_indexed, status, error_message, note) VALUES (#{source}, #{totalFetched}, #{totalIndexed}, #{status}, #{errorMessage}, #{note})
